title: Pacaltsdorp CFP AGM next week
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Pacaltsdorp community police forum (CPF) will have its elective AGM to elect the new executive committee on Thursday 24 October at 18:00 at Pacaltsdorp police station.

Station Commander Lieutenant Colonel Mzwandile Kama cordially invites all existing and new organisations and businesses to register for membership to the Pacaltsdorp CPF.

Membership forms and further details are available by contacting  Sergeant Sergio Bowkers (Pacaltsdorp CPF coordinator) on 079 894 1362 or via e-mail at:  [email protected].

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
